case_title: POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER VS. ENTANGO CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($80) SERVED AUG-23-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENTANGO CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER 501 (C) (3) NON PROFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ENTANGO CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED. 2 PERSON TO APPEAR: MATTHEW BANDIERA (FINANCE MANAGER) AND LEIGH ILLION (DIRECTOR OF DEVELOPMENT) FOR THE PLAINTIFF POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER 501 (C) (3) NON PROFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTANGO CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,130.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LEIGH ILLION--MANAGER AND MATTHEW BANDIERA--FINANCE MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
